title: MAS evidence generation manifest
description: Canonical generation members plus byte-bound MAS review receipts. Cross-field fingerprints, required roles, scope and receipt inventories are recomputed by the MAS handler.

professional_skill_invocations.description: Optional on legacy v2 manifests. Current manuscript/publication generations carry exact manuscript and Figure Skill candidate receipts. Missing receipts remain quality debt rather than an invalid legacy manifest.

member_id.description: Opaque stable identity assigned by the MAS owner. It MUST NOT be derived from, or changed solely because of, ref/path/locator values. The MAS handler rejects duplicate member_id values across a v2 root inventory and within review members.

ref.description: Current locator retained for inventory, snapshot transport, and provenance. Every epistemic review-lane topology identity excludes this locator, including exact_byte_package.

epistemic_review_scope.description: MAS supplies only its domain dependency graph. Generic validation and currentness evaluation remain owned by the OPL Framework canonical contract.

review_input_snapshot_binding.description: Opaque Framework snapshot binding. MAS owns lane, scope, member semantics, currentness, and verdict in the enclosing review receipt.
